title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIOS IN THE THIRD DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE

chunks.text:
H. No. 1694 / 55 OG No. 39, 8260 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2563, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIOS IN THE THIRD DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
